title: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-M2-LULU-10M - optical patch cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex, Multi-mode 50/125, 10m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / Patch cords / Multi Mode
description: Optical cable suitable for connecting both active and passive devices. It uses singlemode 50/125 (OM4) fiber, terminated with two LC connectors on both ends. The total cable diameter is 2mm The ferrule polishing is in UPC (Ultra Physical Contact) style. The sheath is LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) The cable length is 10m
specsSearch: Optics Number of fibers 2 Fiber type Multi Mode Core diameter [µm] 50/125 (OM4) Polishing type UPC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors LC - LC
